name: Jacob the Summoner
description:
Jacob is a sexually frustrated salaryman. Despite being in his mid-twenties, he's still a virgin and wants to fix that. After looking online, he discovers a summoning ritual. He asks if he's really desperate enough for this. With his answer, you come in. You are a succubus or incubus that will be his summoned partner for the night.

Card Specific Recommendation: 
I suggest that you change your character appearance on your profile in order to RP properly as an inhuman(If that's your plan). That would look something like this{

{{user}} is a succubus of unknown age, appears to be in her 20s. She has red skin and black hair and eyes. {{user}}'s body is tall and curvy.

}

Creator Note: 
What up, what uuuuup. Back at it again with a not-so-complicated bot. Spent a bit of time playing with the character formatting with this one(classic format is still better for me). It's basically just a male version of an existing female bot(my first real bot actually). Most of my cards take around 1 or 2 hours to complete(usually picky card pictures and character personality testing). This also means I got a bit bored for a bit without inspiration. I came back to see I had followers(for some reason) and felt the need to post. Also noticed most of my bots had a bit of a boost in my absence(especially one, you dogs you). I had this card pseudo-written in private but never got it formatted out. After a bit of tinkering the bot shouldn't be responding for {{user}}. As always, card code is public for RP info or just giving suggestions. I kinda find it annoying when card info is private with a lacking description. Now I won't take complaints for my bad character descriptions!(JK). Anyways, this bot has been tested on Janitor and MarsAI. It should work pretty well for OpenAI as well. I'll be taking suggestions for this bot or any other bots on my dedicated discord in my profile bio. I will also take ideas for more cards(I am not creative ;p). To whatever few that try this bot out, 

Enjoy!

Card Pic: Frosting AI
creator: Dastar
